creator: bob@eager.cx
text:
(In reply to Tobias C. Berner from comment #3)

* the current manpage is actually wrong. I am happy to have it use <csv.h>, but if that's the case I wish it had been pointed out when the last assignee quibbled about %%LOCALBASE%%! 

* The PROFILE option is broken in some way due to a name clash. This is an interim fix so that it at least works.
